items.title: Unauthenticated File Upload in Amasty Order Attributes
items.summary: An unauthenticated arbitrary file upload flaw in Amasty Order Attributes allows attackers to write executable files to a Magento store without logging in, potentially leading to remote code execution.

items.title: Unauthenticated PHP Object Injection in Mirasvit Cache Warmer
items.summary: A critical unauthenticated PHP object injection vulnerability in Mirasvit Cache Warmer (versions prior to 1.11.12) allows remote code execution via a crafted cookie on any storefront request.

items.title: Improper Limitation of a Pathname to a Restricted Directory ('Path Traversal')
items.summary: Adobe Commerce versions 2.4.9-beta1 and earlier are affected by a path traversal vulnerability (CVSS 8.7) that could result in arbitrary file system read and write by an authenticated attacker with administrative privileges.

items.title: Incorrect Authorization Vulnerability
items.summary: An incorrect authorization vulnerability (CVSS 7.5) in Adobe Commerce allows a remote, unauthenticated attacker to bypass security checks and gain unauthorized write access to the application.

items.title: Uncontrolled Resource Consumption (Denial-of-Service)
items.summary: An uncontrolled resource consumption flaw in Adobe Commerce allows an unauthenticated attacker to send crafted network requests that exhaust system resources, leading to a denial-of-service condition.

items.title: Security update available for Adobe Commerce and Magento Open Source
items.summary: This security update resolves multiple critical, important, and moderate vulnerabilities, including arbitrary code execution, arbitrary file system write, application denial-of-service, and security feature bypass.

items.title: Unrestricted File Upload in Magento REST API
items.summary: Sansec discovered a critical flaw in Magento's REST API, dubbed PolyShell, that allows unauthenticated attackers to upload executable files to any store by disguising code as an image.

items.title: Critical Security Update for Adobe Commerce and Magento Open Source
items.summary: This critical security update addresses multiple vulnerabilities that could allow attackers to bypass security controls, gain escalated privileges, and execute unauthorized malicious code on Adobe Commerce and Magento Open Source installations.
